content: The 5S Cognitive methodology consists of Sort (Seiri), Set in Order (Seiton), Shine (Seiso), Standardize (Seiketsu), and Sustain (Shitsuke) applied directly to LLM agent reasoning structures.
Toy Neural Networks use backpropagation and gradient descent to modify node weights and biases. Convergence on non-linear gates like XOR requires at least one hidden layer.
Sub-process sandboxing is executed on the Node.js backend using express endpoints linked to child_process exec loops. It supports JavaScript and Python code blocks.
